summary.shape_sentence: Early push into a morning high failed, then the session stair-stepped lower with two sharp recovery attempts that could not reclaim the open.

goat.note: Strongest clean directional expansion was the early-PM flush from roughly 25900 into 25820.

red_circles.behavior: Best bearish pivots aligned with lower-high failures after the morning HOD, especially near 26125, 26000, and 25975.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots were countertrend bounce points at roughly 25955, 25820, and 25790; none reclaimed the open.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply near 26120-26150, 26000-26020, and 25960-25980 was respected after the morning failure.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 25900 broke in early afternoon; lower demand near 25820-25790 produced reaction bounces.

time_markers.10am_blue: Upper-distribution rotation after the opening push, below HOD but still elevated.
time_markers.12pm_red: Active downside continuation from a late-morning lower high.
time_markers.2pm_green: Strong rebound underway from the early-PM flush, still below the open and supply.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Bearish close below the open after a late reversal attempt.

takeaway: Bearish failed-drive trend day: early push into supply set the high, then lower highs controlled the session while late demand created only a partial reversal.
